title: Sankara Nethralaya is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sankara Nethralaya is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
